text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking past the station, I see a
pair of familiar faces calling out to passersby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um, h-hello! We're having an, uh, event, at, um,
Tracen Academy, so, um...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The student council is having an event! Do feel
free to take a flyer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry, I'm really bad at this. I'm not helping
at all, am I?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it. You're doing just fine. I'm
sure you'll get the hang of it once—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry. I've just received a text from the
president.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: "Return to the academy ASAP." Oh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to at least hand out half of these,
but oh well. Back to school it is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Please go on ahead. I'll stay here and keep
handing out flyers.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? You might have to deal with
gawkers or talk to people you aren't comfortable
with...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know... But I really want to help you out for
once.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...All right. Just don't push yourself too hard,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Breathe in... Breathe out... Okay. I can do this. I
just need to announce that we're holding an
event...

text_block_list.name: Male Passerby
text_block_list.text:
An event? Tracen Academy is doing something?
Yeah, I think I might grab a flyer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh?! G-go ahead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Th-that was just a practice run. Next time, I'm
going to speak clearly and hand out the flyers
myself!

text_block_list.name: Tourist Group
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Is she from Tracen Academy? Oh, she's
looking this way! Hellooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ignore... the stares. Ignore... the... s-stares...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I... I can't do it! What should I do? I went and told
Air Groove I could handle this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And after I made up my mind that I wouldn't let
any obstacle get in my way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll scale any walls that stand in my way! This is
what you meant when you were talking about
working toward becoming your ideal self, right,
Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I was so sure, but in the end, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is trembling in distress. I wonder if
there's anything I can say to assuage her fears?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is trembling in distress. I wonder if
there's anything I can say to assuage her fears?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ah, here yo—wait, you're...

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text:
Flyers? Is there some kind of event going on?
Whoa! Tracen Academy's putting on an event?!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they're having a raffle for autographs too!
Oh my gosh, yeah! Can I get a flyer, please?!
Me too, me too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I called out to her a little too loudly. So many people are rushing over, there's no way she can possibly handle them alone!
choice_data_list: I-I'll help you hand those out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe it. I handed out all the flyers?
Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh... I wasn't asking you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks. I couldn't have handed them all out
without you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All of them, you say? You mean you finished
handing them out?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Incredible. You surpassed all my expectations. I
guess my worries were unfounded.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Dober, you've really changed. I'm pleased to see
how much you've grown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I didn't accomplish this alone. I had help. So
really...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh, forget about all that for now. You'll figure it
out one day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But your efforts really have helped. So, I'll say
this...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That was directed at you too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um, I also wanted to say... You helped, uh, a bit...
Bye.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Um! I also wanted to say... Thank you so, so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's the pride she feels at having
distributed all the flyers, but when I catch a brief
glimpse of Mejiro Dober's profile, I see a smile on
her face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Eek! The wind's too strong! Oh no! The flyers are
getting blown away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, a strong gust of wind scatters all the
flyers! In a panic, I rush to help gather them up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... I think we somehow managed to get all of them, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I'm finally ba—oh, what happened here?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see. That sounds like quite the disaster.
...Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...A-Air Groove, I'm so sor—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well done. You did the best you could.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You used to be too timid to even put yourself out
there. I'm pleased to see how much you've grown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I... I said I'd take care of it for you, and I
couldn't even hand out a single flyer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh, forget about all that for now. You'll figure it
out one day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your help too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober returns to the academy deep in
thought, pondering the meaning behind Air
Groove's words.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, that badge on your collar...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...No thanks. And don't give me your trainer spiel,
either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, but I don't want to bother one of the
academy's trainers. I appreciate the sentiment,
though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hmph! You're so nosy! I can do this by myself! I have to do this by myself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No, really, I'm okay. I should do this by myself!

text_block_list.name: Student Passersby
text_block_list.text:
What's this? What's all the commotion about?
Looks like they're passing out flyers? What for?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh! Um!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hey! ...Oh, fine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh... you're just too nice. You'll be stuck here all
day at this rate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without giving her much of a chance to refuse my
help, I start handing out the flyers...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Phew... We still have half of the flyers left, but it's already getting dark. If we just keep going for a little longer...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No need. Well done, you've handed out more
than enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you really handed out half of them. You
went all out.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...You've really grown, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, n-not at all. I was just kicking up a
commotion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I still needed help getting people's
attention and handing out flyers. So really...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh, forget about all that for now. You'll figure it
out one day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But your efforts really have helped me out. So,
thank you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That was directed at you too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I didn't ask you to help, but... thanks. I guess.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'm sorry for all the trouble! Thank you very
much!
